title: File permissions issue in multistage builds
body:
### Issue Description

There appears to be some kind of a race condition in multistage builds.
Directories containing mounts from another stage sometimes end up having incorrect permissions.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Here is a minimal reproducer:

```
FROM docker.io/alpine AS base

FROM docker.io/alpine
USER nobody:nogroup
WORKDIR /tmp
RUN touch 1
RUN --mount=from=base,source=/tmp,target=/tmp/x \
    touch 2
RUN echo -n "$(stat -c "mode = %A " /tmp)"; touch 3 && echo "OK" || echo "FAIL"
```


### Describe the results you received

```
$ for i in $(seq 1 20); do ./bin/podman-remote-static-linux_amd64_6.0.0 build --no-cache . | grep "^mode"; done | nl -n rz -w 2
01	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
02	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
03	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
04	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
05	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
06	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
07	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
08	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
09	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
10	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
11	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
12	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
13	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
14	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
15	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
16	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
17	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
18	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
19	mode = drwxr-xr-x touch: 3: Permission denied
20	mode = drwxrwxrwt OK
```

I can't reproduce this issue if I:
- replace `touch 1` or `touch 2` with `true`
- mount `base` to a location that is not under /tmp

### Describe the results you expected

/tmp permissions should not change after `RUN --mount [...]`

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

Might be related to https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/issues/18093.
